[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 11010111 6
2 01111000 4
3 00111101 5
4 11101100 5
5 01110000 3
6 00101100 3
7 11100001 4

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 01000100 2
23 32 01010000 2
34 43 00111000 3
45 54 00101100 3 match 6
56 65 01100000 2
67 76 00100000 1
70 07 00100000 1

13 31 01001000 2

35 53 01101000 3

60 06 01100000 2

50 05 11100000 3
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 00000100 1

04 40 00100001 2

37 73 00101000 2
